title: Walk-in Drive Real Estate Agent at Sunteck Realty

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Real Estate Agent at Sunteck Realty
jsonLd.description:
Sunteck Realty, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Real Estate Agent for our Patna operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Sunteck Realty:
Sunteck Realty is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Contract Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sunteck Realty!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
